# CounterLine: The Stockfish 18 Killer {.unnumbered}

**A Fixed-Line Repertoire That Scores Over 50% Against Stockfish 18 on the Published CounterLine Suite**

*The CounterLine Project — 2026*

---

This book presents two opening lines — one for White and one for Black — that have been engineered, tested, and validated against Stockfish 18, the strongest classical chess engine in the world as of early 2026.

The White line scores an overwhelming 95% from its exit position. The Black line holds firm with a 53.75% score — including wins — from a position where most engines would be fighting for a draw.

These are not theoretical novelties found by a grandmaster. They are the product of a systematic, automated search through thousands of candidate positions, refined by machine learning, and proved in head-to-head matches under controlled conditions.

**What this book will teach you:**

- The exact moves of the CounterLine repertoire, from move 1
- The plans, patterns, and key positions you need to memorise
- Annotated model games against Stockfish 18
- How to handle opponent deviations
- Training drills and quick-reference cheat sheets
- The precise boundaries of what has been proved — and what has not

**What this book will not claim:**

- That you can beat Stockfish in a general game
- That this repertoire works in every opening
- That these results transfer to all time controls or hardware

Honest engineering. Honest claims. Real results.

---

**License:** This work is distributed as part of the CounterLine project under GPL-3.0.
